message:
fix(net,h1,channel,service,database,web): cached combined waker, pong batching, obs-text, PTO overflow, fault ordering, buffer state, sqlite borrow

src/net/tcp/split.rs + src/net/unix/split.rs:
- Cache the combined_waker in SplitIoState instead of rebuilding it on
  every poll, reducing allocations on the hot path. Only rebuild when
  read/write wakers actually change (wakers_changed flag). Eliminates
  redundant combined_waker() calls in rearm and deregister paths.

src/net/websocket/server.rs:
- Batch pong responses: encode pong frames into the write buffer without
  flushing after each one (encode_frame), then flush once after the pong
  loop completes. Prevents O(n) syscalls when multiple pings queue up.
- Add pending_pong_flush flag to track buffered pongs needing flush.
- Extract flush_write_buf() from send_frame() for reuse.
- Add I/O stream flush after write_buf drain for close reliability.

src/http/h1/codec.rs:
- Fall back to Latin-1 decoding for header values containing obs-text
  bytes (>= 0x80) instead of rejecting them, per RFC 9110 §5.5.

src/net/quic_native/transport.rs:
- Replace srtt + 4*rttvar with saturating arithmetic to prevent u64
  overflow in PTO calculation when RTT variance is very large.

src/channel/fault.rs:
- Fix duplicate-before-reorder: clone the value for duplication before
  entering the reorder path, ensuring the duplicate reflects the original
  value rather than a potentially reordered version.

src/service/buffer.rs:
- Add PolledAfterCompletion error variant for BufferError.
- Fix state machine: use &mut references instead of std::mem::replace
  to avoid moving out of pin-projected fields. Transition to Done state
  only on completion, not on every poll iteration.
- Rustfmt long type annotations in tests.

src/database/sqlite.rs:
- Fix double-borrow in Row accessor methods: bind self.get(column)? to
  a local before calling .as_integer()/.as_text() etc., preventing the
  borrow checker from holding two references to self simultaneously.

src/observability/task_inspector.rs:
- Rename test for clarity and add aborted-obligation coverage to verify
  the inspector only reports pending (not aborted) obligations.

src/web/{health,session}.rs:
- Reorder parking_lot::Mutex import to standard position and collapse
  single-line lock().push/insert chains for readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
